items.question: What is d/dx of (2x + 3)⁴?
items.explanation: Outer power rule 4u³ times inner derivative 2 with u = 2x+3.

items.question: Backpropagation in neural networks is best described as:
options: Reverse-mode chain rule on the computation graph
items.answer: Reverse-mode chain rule on the computation graph
items.explanation: Gradients flow backward by multiplying upstream signals with local derivatives at each op.
